---
name: Feature request
about: New detection pattern, defense rule, or capability
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: subkoks
---

## Threat scenario

What attack or risk does this address? Cite a CVE, writeup, paper, or PoC if
one exists — speculative patterns without evidence are usually declined.

## Proposed change

What should be added or changed (new red-flag pattern, per-tool defense,
scanner check, refusal template, etc.)?

## Where it belongs

- [ ] `skills/prompt-injection-security/` (core discipline / references)
- [ ] `skills/injection-audit/` (audit command)
- [ ] `agents/injection-auditor.md` (auditor agent)
- [ ] `scripts/scan.sh` (offline scanner)
- [ ] Other:

## Detection cost

Any false-positive risk this introduces, and how to bound it.
